rationale: Integrates with Daax plugin system, enabling easy toggling, isolation, and reuse of infrastructure
impact: Seamless integration with routing, theming, and UI components

rationale: Provides 60fps performance, pixel-perfect control, and enables advanced visual effects
impact: Smooth animations, better performance, more control over visual effects

decision: React hooks with useReducer for state management
rationale: No external library needed, predictable state transitions, easy debugging, natural React integration
impact: Simplified dependencies, clearer game logic flow

rationale: Creates engaging, unique experience with Greek mythology theming that appeals to fans
impact: Distinctive visual identity with god-themed pieces, thematic colors, and mythological references

decision: Map each tetromino to a Greek god
rationale: Creates narrative connection and makes pieces more memorable and engaging
impact: I=Poseidon(Trident), O=Athena(Shield), T=Zeus(Lightning), S=Hermes(Wing), Z=Ares(Sword), J=Artemis(Bow), L=Apollo(Lyre)

rationale: Reflects Camp Half-Blood colors and Greek mythology aesthetics (ocean, celestial bronze, gold)
impact: Cohesive visual theme that matches Percy Jackson universe

decision: Classic Tetris mechanics (10x20 grid, 7 pieces, standard rotation)
rationale: Proven gameplay, familiar to players, well-balanced difficulty curve
impact: Maintains classic Tetris feel while adding thematic elements

decision: Add hold piece and next piece preview
rationale: Modern Tetris quality-of-life features that enhance strategic gameplay
impact: Better player experience, more strategic depth

rationale: Browser-native 60fps timing, automatically pauses when tab inactive, efficient

decision: Keyboard controls with standard Tetris bindings
rationale: Familiar to Tetris players, accessible, no learning curve
impact: Arrow keys for movement, space for hard drop, C for hold, standard Tetris UX

decision: Progressive difficulty with level-based speed increase
rationale: Classic Tetris progression that keeps gameplay challenging and engaging
impact: Difficulty increases every 10 lines, drop speed decreases from 1000ms to 100ms

decision: Standard Tetris scoring system with multipliers
rationale: Proven scoring formula, rewards combos and Tetris clears, encourages skillful play
impact: Single=100, Double=300, Triple=500, Tetris=800, multiplied by level+1

rationale: Provides smooth gameplay experience, standard for modern games
impact: Smooth animations, responsive controls, professional feel

rationale: Efficient rendering by only updating when needed, no DOM manipulation overhead
impact: Lower CPU usage, better battery life, smoother performance

rationale: Easy to set up, secure HTTPS, no port forwarding needed, free tier available
impact: Shareable public URL without deploying to cloud, keeps local development workflow

decision: Run as part of Daax app on port 4200
rationale: Integrated with existing infrastructure, no separate deployment needed
impact: Access at /tetris route, shares resources with main app
